Off Calendar Jul-21-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. RICHARD E. ORIAKHI, ESQ. of the Law Offices of Richard E. Oriakhi, Tel No. 415-251-6641 appearing telephonically for the Plaintiff;
Atty. ROY S. WOO, ESQ. of Philip M. Andersen & Associates, Tel No. 925-225-6857 appearing telephonically for Defendant Ivria Ben-Or.

RULING - Parties stipulated to matter being heard by the judge pro tem. Matter argued and submitted by counsel. The Court withdrew its tentative ruling, and ordered as follows: On the appearance of all parties, DEFENDANT IVRIA BEN-OR'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQUEST, DEMAND INSPECTION, PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS is granted. Defendant to prepare and submit a proposed order. Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

ARGUED - R U L I N G: DEFENDANT IVRIA BEN-OR'S Motion To Compel Responses To Defendant's Discovery Requests is granted pursuant to stipulation of the parties. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Robert F. Kane; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported.
